gazette: Official Gazette dated March 01, 2024, and numbered 32476
title: Amendments in the list of goods subject to CE-TAREKS Regulation
bodyHtml:
The following changes have been made to the goods list annexed to the CE-TAREKS Regulation. The amendments, effective from January 1, 2024, entered into force as of March 1 , 2024.

Serial No GTIP Description Amendment Made

49 8414.59.95.90.00 Others those used in motor vehicles  excluded

98 8421.39.25.90.00 Others those used in motor vehicles  excluded

491 8516.80.20.00.19 Others (excluding those used in motor vehicles for road use) Removed from the CE Regulation

514 8531.10.30.00.19 Others Removed from the CE Regulation

515 8534.00.11.00.00 Multilayer circuits Removed from the CE Regulation

516 8534.00.19.00.00 Others Removed from the CE Regulation

546 8536.90.95.00.00 Others Removed from the CE Regulation

575 8542.39.90.00.00 Others Removed from the CE Regulation

494 8519.81.00.00.00 Those using magnetic, optical, or semiconductor supports Will also be subject to inspection under the LVD directive

For the Amendment to the Import Inspection Regulation of Some Products Bearing the "CE" Mark (Product Safety and Inspection: 2024/9), click here.
